---
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: custom.scss
    slide-number: true
    title-slide: false
    width: 1280
    height: 720
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {

  // Logos
  const container = document.createElement('div');
  container.style.cssText = 'position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100vw; height:100vh; pointer-events:none; z-index:9999;';
  const logos = [
    { src: 'IMDEA_transparent.png',   pos: 'top:10px; left:10px;',     size: 'height:60px; width:auto;' },
    { src: 'uc3m_logo.png',           pos: 'top:10px; right:10px;',    size: 'height:55px; width:auto;' },
    { src: 'CAM_transparent.png',     pos: 'bottom:10px; left:10px;',  size: 'height:60px; width:auto;' },
    { src: 'secret_transparent2.png', pos: 'bottom:10px; right:10px;', size: 'width:220px; height:auto;' },
  ];
  logos.forEach(function(logo) {
    const img = document.createElement('img');
    img.src = logo.src;
    img.style.cssText = 'position:absolute; ' + logo.pos + ' ' + logo.size;
    container.appendChild(img);
  });
  document.body.appendChild(container);

  // Title slide content
  const titleSlide = document.querySelector('.reveal .slides section:first-child');
  if (titleSlide) {
    titleSlide.innerHTML = `
      <div style="text-align:center; margin-top:10px;">
        <h1 style="font-size:1.8em; color:#1a1a2e; font-weight:bold; line-height:1.3;">
          Thermoplastic Materials for<br>Thermoformable Clear Aligners
        </h1>
        <hr style="border:2px solid #0066cc; width:60%; margin:20px auto;">
        <p style="font-size:1em;"><strong>PhD Candidate:</strong> José Ignacio Delgado Castaño</p>
        <p style="font-size:0.85em; color:#555;"><strong>Thesis Director:</strong> Dr. Juan Pedro Fernández Blázquez</p>
        <p style="font-size:0.85em; color:#555;"><strong>PhD Program:</strong> Materials Science and engineering</p>
        <p style="font-size:0.8em; color:#555"><strong>University:</strong> Universidad Carlos III de Madrid</p>
         <p style="font-size:0.75em; color:#888; margin-top:20px;">July 2026</p>
      </div>
    `;
  }
});
</script>
```

## Index

Hello world

## State of the art

Second slide
